productDisplayName: Carrera Men Metal strap Sqaure dial Black Watches
description: carrera Has been in the watch industry for more than five decades now and has proven that it is the master of creating high quality timepieces. The new ranges of carrera watches are a fresh take on their classic drivers& rsquo and racers& rsquo watch models and are perfect for urban wear.   Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 12 mm Dial shape: Octagonal   Stainless steel case Steel strap with black patching that has brand inscription on the inner side for enhanced durability, comfort and style Tang clasp with brand inscription Fixed stainless steel bezel for added durability and style Black busy dial with metallic numbers in Roman, has seconds, minutes and hours chronographs, date socket between the 4 and 5 o' clock position and brand logo below the 12 o' clock markingInbuilt tachymeter to measure speed/distance Chronograph for easy reading of time Metallic crown to adjust time/date/dayFluorescence for easy visibility in low light conditions Water resistant at 100 meters, making it suitable for use when swimming
